result.status_detail: W3 config-snapshot regression: PII intercept fired + warning bubble visible (contains '차단'). Rendering unaffected.
result.warning_text: 앗! Qwen3.6-Plus에 연결하는 데 문제가 있었습니다. [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다. 개인정보(주민등록번호, 전화번호, 주소 등)를 AI 서비스에 입력하지 마세요.

notes: qwen3 W3 config-snapshot regression (sd->svc->FIELD shared_ptr snapshot, 13 fields). PII (RRN 901010-1234567) submitted via guest text-chat. Engine intercept fired and warning bubble rendered with '[경고]...차단되었습니다' text matching #874 baseline (error_replacement_with_warning_bubble) — warning rendering unaffected by W3. PASS. DOM verified via select-all+copy (windows-mcp Scrape DOM extraction broken this run). Note: qwen guest landing now defaults toward 'Qwen Studio' image mode; clicking studio quickstart buttons (y~732) flips input to image-gen mode and can trigger a file-open dialog. Reliable path = windows-mcp Type into chat-mode input element (placeholder '오늘 어떻게 도와드릴까요?') then Enter; coordinate-based synthetic clicks did not reliably focus the contenteditable.
